project.name: EigenTrades
project.tagline: AI-powered algorithmic trading platform with explainable decisions
project.objective: Show end-to-end engineering from data pipeline to ML decisions to human-readable LLM explanations with production-style quality gates

executive_summary.one_liner: Built a full pipeline: ingest and normalize market data, train an ensemble prediction engine, explain decisions with LLM logic, and validate through strict CI/testing gates.
executive_summary.final_status: All planned phases complete with automated validation.
key_outcomes: Ensemble ML benchmark gate passing (accuracy threshold met)
LLM explainer latency gate passing (sub-2s threshold met)
UI boot validated for live demo
Strict positive and strict negative end-to-end tests implemented

core_modules.responsibility: Normalize OHLCV datasets into canonical schema
Production-safe ingestion with retries, checkpoints, dead letter, audit logging, optimization verify/refresh
Ridge + RandomForest ensemble with feature engineering and confidence scoring
Trade signal interpretation via local rules or cloud providers with fallback
Backtesting engine with trade lifecycle and performance metrics
Interactive system overview, strategy studio, model lab, explainer and risk dashboards

phase_1_data_infrastructure.notes: Oracle schema supports partitioned historical data plus prediction/trade/ingestion audit structures.

modeling_details.ensemble_rule: average of ridge decision and forest probability

optimization_controls.INGESTION_REQUIRE_DB_OPTIMIZATION: default false; set true for strict fail-fast

behavior: Cloud mode fallback to local when key/client unavailable
Latency measured and returned per explanation
Trade and signal level explanations supported

strict_e2e_cases: positive strict case: optimization present -> ingestion succeeds + refresh + audit
negative strict case: optimization required but missing -> fail-fast + dead-letter generated

interpretation: Accuracy gate met with margin above threshold
LLM local explain latency far below threshold

ci_cd.resulting_behavior: Build fails if tests fail or if benchmark thresholds are not met

deploy_sequence: Run pytest and benchmark gate for release validation

what_we_fixed_during_grind.problem: Optimization strategy existed in SQL/comments but not affecting runtime
what_we_fixed_during_grind.fix: Integrated OracleOptimizationManager verify/refresh into ingestion run path
what_we_fixed_during_grind.impact: Optimization is now enforced and observable in pipeline behavior

what_we_fixed_during_grind.problem: Phase 6 had smoke coverage but no strict operational gates
what_we_fixed_during_grind.fix: Added phase6 benchmark script and CI gate with thresholds

what_we_fixed_during_grind.problem: Need deeper e2e validation including failure modes
what_we_fixed_during_grind.fix: Added strict positive and strict negative ingestion e2e tests with mocked Oracle behavior

what_we_fixed_during_grind.problem: Cloud LLM availability can be inconsistent
what_we_fixed_during_grind.fix: Retained local fallback mode and tested fallback behavior
what_we_fixed_during_grind.impact: Demo resilience even without API keys

demo_script_7_minutes.minute_0_1: Problem statement: black-box trading decisions, need explainability + reliability
demo_script_7_minutes.minute_1_2: Show architecture slide and phase progression
demo_script_7_minutes.minute_2_3: Launch UI and show system overview dashboard
demo_script_7_minutes.minute_3_4: Run Strategy Studio backtest and discuss key metrics
demo_script_7_minutes.minute_4_5: Show LLM explanation output and latency
demo_script_7_minutes.minute_5_6: Show Phase 6 benchmark JSON and CI gate logic
demo_script_7_minutes.minute_6_7: Show strict negative e2e concept and production risk controls

slide_blueprint: Problem statement and why this matters
ML feature engineering and model ensemble

limitations: No full cloud infra automation template committed yet
Operational hardening backlog remains (alerting, autoscaling, secrets manager)
Some benchmark claims in SQL comments are design targets unless measured on real Oracle workload
next_steps: Add deployment automation scripts or IaC
Add runtime telemetry dashboard for ingestion/latency

presentation_tips.story_arc: From prototype to production-grade quality gates
what_professor_will_notice: You validated both success and failure paths
You added measurable thresholds, not just features
You integrated DB optimization into runtime, not only docs
You can demo locally with deterministic outputs
q_and_a_prepared_answers: Why this model: ensemble balances stability and interpretability
How trustworthy: strict tests plus benchmark gate in CI
What if external API fails: local explainer fallback
How production-safe: retries, checkpointing, dead-letter, strict optimization enforcement
